title: The Bomb Plot Comes Into Focus
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on the bomb plot comes into focus, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Bomb Plot Comes Into Focus. Luffy comes back for another fight with Crocodile, now armed with the will to keep standing. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Did you come by the secret path you used to use as a child...!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: With the intention of persuading the Royalist Forces, but...

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: The first time I had a

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The first thing I see here is the king... About to be murdered at the hands of this "Country's Hero"...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I can hardly believe what I'm seeing...

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Kuhahaha! Isn't this an interesting turn of events!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: In the midst of the rebellion's climax... To think the leaders of both sides would all come here and meet each other!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: It's as if this war is being fought by head-less lizards!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: You seem confused but it's quite simple.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Just imagine the worst-case scenario in your head and I'm sure you're bound to reach the correct answer.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Do not doubt the king, Kouza

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Yup! It's the country I was born in!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: That's all undoubtedly the work of...

summary: This part develops the bomb plot comes into focus and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
